questions:
Q1: What are the antonyms of "Introverted"?

B. modest
C. Optimistic

Q2: What are the synonyms of "Compassionate"?
A. conceited
B. Negative
C. Kind, sympathetic

Q3: What is the meaning of "Humble"?
A. Gets angry easily
B. Not proud
C. Quiet and reserved

A. Understanding, sensitive
B. gloomy
C. Kind

A. sensitive
B. Shy, withdrawn
C. simple

A. Optimistic, hopeful
B. Calm
C. proud

Q7: What is the meaning of "Ambitious"?
A. Quiet and reserved
B. Strong desire to succeed
C. Too proud of oneself
